description.value:
Trigger A creature enters the area the haunt has power over

Effect The haunt rolls on the Corrupt Terrain table, then rolls initiative. The DC for all effects is 20.

details.description: A supernatural power rapidly changes the surroundings of this area to horrify the living.
details.disable: Disable @Check[perception|dc:26] to see through the haunt or @Check[occultism|dc:30] or @Check[religion|dc:30] to banish the visions, and @Check[diplomacy|dc:28] to snap someone else out of it once you are free. Disabling only ends the haunt's effects on one creature.
details.routine:
(3 actions) The haunt rolls on the Corrupt Terrain table.

[[/r 1d6]]

Results

1

Flesh and egg-sacs crawl along the walls, and an acidic smell penetrates your nose. Living creatures must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:20] save, becoming sickened 1 on a failure and sickened 2 on a critical failure. This lasts until the haunt ends. (visual)

2

The walls morph into sharp iron spikes splattered with blood, and meat hooks dangle from the ceiling. Living creatures moving in the area take 4d8 piercing damage (@Check[reflex|dc:20|basic] ). (metal)

3

Infinite darkness envelops you, and the sounds of something tremendously huge rumble nearby. The haunt casts a 2nd-rank darkness spell.

4

Plants made of flesh, bones, and nerves grow from all surfaces, crying out in the voices of agonized loved ones. Living creatures must attempt a @Check[will|dc:20] save or become frightened 1 until the haunt ends (frightened 2 on a critical failure). (auditory, emotion, mental, fear)

5

Everything goes white, and you feel your senses leaving you as your body goes numb. Living creatures take 4d8 cold damage (@Check[fortitude|dc:20|basic] save). (visual)

6

You experience your worst nightmare again (as the electronic figment's ability). Living creatures take 4d8 mental damage (@Check[will|dc:20|basic] save). (emotion, mental)
